title: deal.purchased (v1)
description: Published by the Approvals Service when the purchase API call succeeds. Triggers the listing workflow asynchronously. See TDD Sections 3.2.1, 5.4, 5.5, 6.3.

approval_id.description: The approval record that authorised this purchase.

user_id.description: The user who owns the deal.

sku_title.description: Human-readable product title for webhook consumers.

buy_retailer.description: Retailer where the purchase was made.

actual_buy_price_gbp.description: The actual price paid at checkout, which may differ from the surfaced price.

order_reference.description: Retailer order reference for tracking and support.
